raw_prompt: The Boss asks: Compute the storage size for this new OLAP cube. We have 1 million rows.
raw_response:
METHOD: OLAP Cube Storage Size
INPUTS:
  Rows=1,000,000 [VERIFIED]
  Row size=DATA UNAVAILABLE [not supplied]
  Dimensions=DATA UNAVAILABLE [not supplied]
FORMULA: Storage=Rows x Row Size x (1+dim_overhead)
SUBSTITUTION: blocked - row size and dims DUA
RESULT: DATA UNAVAILABLE
evidence_quotes: Computation block: row size/dimensions marked DATA UNAVAILABLE
States what inputs complete the computation
